_design_note: INJECTION STRATEGY vs SCOPE: The 'layer' field defines DEFAULT injection behavior. An agent's knowledge_requirements lists can OVERRIDE this default (e.g., placing a role_specific entry in must_know[] to always inject). The entry's applicable_to field controls SCOPE (who can reference it), independent of injection strategy.

layers.description: Inviolable principles. Always injected for all agents. No override possible.
Critical context. Default: always injected for agents that list it. Can be global (applicable_to many) or private (applicable_to one agent).
Important guidance. Default: summary in prompt, full via consult tool. Agent can override by placing in must_know[].
Specialist reference material. Default: menu/tool access. Agent can override by placing in must_know[] for always-inject. Use for detailed heuristics that expand on constraints.
Large corpus for RAG search. Always requires explicit query. No override to always-inject (too large).
